title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform reliability and Salesforce integration stability. Key improvements include better detection of Salesforce configuration issues and enhanced deployment processes that prevent common setup problems from blocking your revenue operations workflows.

entries.headline: Better detection of Salesforce configuration issues
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when your Salesforce org uses State and Country picklists, preventing common setup errors
Improved validation ensures your revenue workflows deploy correctly the first time

entries.headline: More reliable Salesforce workflow deployments
details: Complex Salesforce automations now deploy more consistently with improved error handling

entries.headline: Restored HubSpot integration functionality
details: Fixed a critical issue that was preventing HubSpot workflows from starting properly
